source_jobs.title: Ex-Founders Talent Pool
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE GENERALIST COMPANY

We're making it radically easier for founders to find the talent they actually need, and for operators to do their most impactful and meaningful work.

We exist because founders waste time, effort and money on mis-scoped roles, mismatched skill sets, and slow recruiting - while brilliant generalists and operators struggle to find work that values their range and impact.

We fix that. We connect high-context talent with high-growth opportunities: freelance, fractional, contract, or full-time. Whether it’s a launch, a turnaround, or a first hire, we bring in the right people at the right moment. It’s faster, sharper, and built on trust.


AT A GLANCE

 - Location: Remote (global opportunities)

 - Compensation: You set your rate - freelance/contract, fractional, or full-time

 - Contract Type: Flexible - project-based, deployments, part-time, full-time

 - Start Date: Ongoing - join the pool, we’ll match you when the fit is right


ABOUT OUR OPPORTUNITIES

We work with some of the most ambitious early-stage startups and growing scale-ups - and they’re looking for people who’ve lived the founder journey.

This is for people who want to be where it matters - not on the sidelines.

Not just exited founders or execs. This is for anyone who’s built something real, led through chaos, shipped before it was ready, or carried a team through uncertainty. Whether it worked or it didn’t, you came out sharper - and you want to use that experience to help others avoid the same mistakes.

The roles vary. The impact doesn’t. You might come in as a fractional exec, product lead, operations stabiliser, interim CPO, or something else entirely. But what connects everyone here is a bias to build and a sense of context founders trust.


THE KINDS OF DISCIPLINES AND ROLES WE MATCH FOR

This isn't about title-matching. It's about lived experience. That said, here are some examples:

 - Ex-CEO / COO / CPO

 - Exited founders looking for their next mission

 - Failed founders with lessons, not just scars

 - Founders who want to stay close to the action while building something new

 - Strategic advisors and interim leaders who bring empathy and clarity to the table

If you've been in the fire and want to help someone else walk through it - you're in the right place.


WHO YOU ARE

You’ve done more than deliver results. You’ve made hard calls, faced uncertainty, and come back with pattern recognition that matters.

Some traits we often see in great-fit operators:

 - You’re calm under pressure - you've felt the chaos and know how to move through it

 - You’re strategic and hands-on - you're just as comfortable zooming out as building the flow

 - You’re scarred and sharp - you've failed, learned, and can see around corners

 - You’re mission-aligned - you want to build things that matter, not just polish your CV

 - You’re humble but effective - you listen more than you talk, but you still lead from the front

 - You’re founder-tuned - you understand what it's like to carry the weight


THIS MIGHT NOT BE FOR YOU IF…

 - You need a rigid structure or slow-moving process

 - You’re looking to scale the same playbook over and over

 - You find it hard to adapt to new missions or founder personalities

 - You haven’t had to make calls with imperfect information

 - You don’t enjoy coaching or working alongside other operators


WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT

Joining means you're on our radar for exciting roles that match your zone of expertise. Here’s how it works:

 - Step 1: You’ll apply

 - Step 2: You’ll connect with us — we’ll explore your experience, craft, and fit

 - Step 3: When a client brief fits your craft and expertise, we’ll get in touch and introduce you to the client and you can explore the opportunity with them directly

 - Step 4: If it's a fit, we'll onboard you and continue to support throughout

You won’t hear from us every week. But when you do, it’ll be for something relevant and real.


WE’RE BUILDING A DIVERSE NET

source_jobs.title: Communities & Events Talent Pool
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE GENERALIST COMPANY

We're making it radically easier for founders to find the talent they actually need, and for operators to do their most impactful and meaningful work.

We exist because founders waste time, effort and money on mis-scoped roles, mismatched skill sets, and slow recruiting - while brilliant generalists and operators struggle to find work that values their range and impact.

We fix that. We connect high-context talent with high-growth opportunities: freelance, fractional, contract, or full-time. Whether it’s a launch, a turnaround, or a first hire, we bring in the right people at the right moment. It’s faster, sharper, and built on trust.


AT A GLANCE

 - Location: Remote (global opportunities)

 - Compensation: You set your rate - freelance/contract, fractional, or full-time

 - Contract Type: Flexible - project-based, deployments, part-time, full-time

 - Start Date: Ongoing - join the pool, we’ll match you when the fit is right


ABOUT OUR OPPORTUNITIES

Startups are increasingly built on connection - not just code. And when done well, community becomes a growth engine.

We work with early teams building communities of customers, operators, developers, investors, and users. Those who want more than an audience - they want belonging.

This is for people who know how to create experiences and ecosystems that bring people together and keep them engaged.

Whether you're running online spaces, launching in-person events, or managing a membership experience end-to-end, your work fosters trust, loyalty, and momentum.


THE KINDS OF DISCIPLINES AND ROLES WE MATCH FOR

You don’t need to fit neatly into a box - but here's an idea of what we're talking about:

 - Community → Community Manager, Forum Lead, Membership Manager

 - Events → Events Manager, Conference Lead, Experience Designer

You might go deep on one discipline or span multiple. That’s the beauty of this pool.


WHO YOU ARE

You’re part producer, part host, part strategist. You get joy from creating spaces where people connect, share, and stay.

Some traits we often see in great-fit community and events talent:

 - You’re people-first - you care deeply about experience and trust

 - You’re energising - people feel your presence, even when you're behind the scenes

 - You’re detail-obsessed - you design every touchpoint with care

 - You’re digitally native - you understand how communities form and grow online

 - You’re on-the-ground - you know how to run an event end-to-end, from brief to breakdown

 - You’re curious - always listening, always evolving the experience


THIS MIGHT NOT BE FOR YOU IF…

 - You prefer structured, corporate environments over scrappy startup contexts

 - You rely on others to make decisions rather than acting autonomously

 - You want to specialise narrowly instead of flexing across functions

 - Ambiguity or autonomy makes you uncomfortable

 - Switching contexts and moving fast feels overwhelming

 - Volatility and change scare you more than they excite you

 - You focus only on execution and resist iteration, feedback, or balancing delivery with creativity


WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT

Joining means you're on our radar for exciting roles that match your zone of expertise. Here’s how it works:

 - Step 1: You’ll apply

 - Step 2: You’ll connect with us — we’ll explore your experience, craft, and fit

 - Step 3: When a client brief fits your craft and expertise, we’ll get in touch and introduce you to the client and you can explore the opportunity with them directly

 - Step 4: If it's a fit, we'll onboard you and continue to support throughout

You won’t hear from us every week. But when you do, it’ll be for something relevant and real.


WE’RE BUILDING A DIVERSE NETWORK

We actively welcome applications from people of all backgrounds, lived experiences, and perspectives. No matter your gender, race, age, neurodiversity, or path into this industry, you’re welcome here.

If you’ve got the skills and mindset, we want to hea

source_jobs.title: Creative Talent Pool
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE GENERALIST COMPANY

We're making it radically easier for founders to find the talent they actually need, and for operators to do their most impactful and meaningful work.

We exist because founders waste time, effort and money on mis-scoped roles, mismatched skill sets, and slow recruiting - while brilliant generalists and operators struggle to find work that values their range and impact.

We fix that. We connect high-context talent with high-growth opportunities: freelance, fractional, contract, or full-time. Whether it’s a launch, a turnaround, or a first hire, we bring in the right people at the right moment. It’s faster, sharper, and built on trust.


AT A GLANCE

 - Location: Remote (global opportunities)

 - Compensation: You set your rate - freelance/contract, fractional, or full-time

 - Contract Type: Flexible - project-based, deployments, part-time, full-time

 - Start Date: Ongoing - join the pool, we’ll match you when the fit is right


ABOUT OUR OPPORTUNITIES

Design and storytelling aren’t just support functions anymore - they are the product, the brand, and the experience.

We work with startups and scaleups that need to look, feel, and sound as bold as the things they’re building.

Whether you're leading a brand refresh, shaping a creative campaign, producing a product video, or building a design system from scratch - your work brings ideas to life.

These are opportunities for creatives who can work with ambiguity, design with intent, and help early teams punch well above their weight.


THE KINDS OF DISCIPLINES AND ROLES WE MATCH FOR

You don’t need to fit neatly into a box - but here's an idea of what we're talking about:

 - Design → Graphic Designer, Brand Designer, Creative Director

 - Content → Copywriter, Content Creator, Social Content Manager

 - Media → Animator, Video Producer, Motion Designer

 - Project Management → Creative Director, Digital Project Manager

You might go deep on one discipline or span multiple. That’s the beauty of this pool.


WHO YOU ARE

You don’t just make things beautiful - you make them make sense. You get startups, move fast, and know when to fight for the idea.

Some traits we often see in great-fit creatives:

 - You’re story-driven - you know how to move people with visuals and voice

 - You’re collaborative - you play well with product, growth, and brand

 - You’re tasteful - you bring a high bar and sharp eye

 - You’re iterative - you know great creative is often built in layers

 - You’re entrepreneurial - you thrive with a blank canvas and a fast pace

 - You’re clear-thinking - you simplify complexity through design and content


THIS MIGHT NOT BE FOR YOU IF…

 - You prefer corporate brand guidelines over blank canvases

 - You want to focus only on one medium instead of flexing across formats

 - You need long timelines and big budgets to create

 - Ambiguity or open briefs frustrate you

 - Fast feedback or iteration feels like rework instead of craft

 - You resist collaborating with product, growth, or founders

 - You struggle to balance creativity with delivery and deadlines


WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT

Joining means you're on our radar for exciting roles that match your zone of expertise. Here’s how it works:

 - Step 1: You’ll apply

 - Step 2: You’ll connect with us — we’ll explore your experience, craft, and fit

 - Step 3: When a client brief fits your craft and expertise, we’ll get in touch and introduce you to the client and you can explore the opportunity with them directly

 - Step 4: If it's a fit, we'll onboard you and continue to support throughout

You won’t hear from us every week. But when you do, it’ll be for something relevant and real.


WE’RE BUILDING A DIVERSE NETWORK

We actively welcome applications from people of all backgrounds, lived experiences, and perspectives. No matter your gender, race, age, neurodiversity, or path into this industry, you’re welcome here.

If you’ve got the skills and mindset, we want to hear from you.

source_jobs.title: Operations & Workflow Talent Pool
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE GENERALIST COMPANY

We're making it radically easier for founders to find the talent they actually need, and for operators to do their most impactful and meaningful work.

We exist because founders waste time, effort and money on mis-scoped roles, mismatched skill sets, and slow recruiting - while brilliant generalists and operators struggle to find work that values their range and impact.

We fix that. We connect high-context talent with high-growth opportunities: freelance, fractional, contract, or full-time. Whether it’s a launch, a turnaround, or a first hire, we bring in the right people at the right moment. It’s faster, sharper, and built on trust.


AT A GLANCE

 - Location: Remote (global opportunities)

 - Compensation: You set your rate - freelance/contract, fractional, or full-time

 - Contract Type: Flexible - project-based, deployments, part-time, full-time

 - Start Date: Ongoing - join the pool, we’ll match you when the fit is right


ABOUT OUR OPPORTUNITIES

Startups and scaleups don’t run without great operators. The challenge is finding people who can create structure without slowing things down.

This is for people who get energy from unblocking others - and building systems that scale.

You might be plugging gaps in finance operations, designing a commercial handoff process, rebuilding revenue workflows, or serving as a Founder’s right hand. Whatever the brief, it’s about flow, clarity, and momentum.

These roles aren’t always flashy. But they’re often the ones that keep the whole thing moving.


THE KINDS OF DISCIPLINES AND ROLES WE MATCH FOR

You don’t need to fit neatly into a box - but here's an idea of what we're talking about:

 - Finance Operations → Finance Ops Manager, FP&A Analyst

 - Revenue Operations → RevOps Manager, Sales Ops Lead

 - Business Operations → Founder’s Associate, Chief of Staff

 - Legal & Compliance → Legal Ops Manager, Compliance Analyst

You might go deep on one discipline or span multiple. That’s the beauty of this pool.


WHO YOU ARE

You love to build order from chaos. You don’t wait for permission to fix things. And you care about how systems affect people.

Some traits we often see in great-fit operators:

 - You’re systems-minded - you love processes, but not for their own sake

 - You’re calm in the mess - ambiguity energises you

 - You’re detail-driven - you can zoom in without losing the big picture

 - You’re commercially aware - you understand where money flows

 - You’re cross-functional - you make things easier for everyone around you

 - You’re resourceful - you solve with what's available


THIS MIGHT NOT BE FOR YOU IF…

 - You prefer rigid corporate processes over flexible systems

 - You avoid making decisions without a perfect playbook

 - You only want to optimise, never build from scratch

 - Ambiguity around priorities frustrates you

 - You find context switching and firefighting overwhelming

 - You shy away from unglamorous but high-leverage fixes

 - You resist iteration, simplification, or killing broken processes


WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT

Joining means you're on our radar for exciting roles that match your zone of expertise. Here’s how it works:

 - Step 1: You’ll apply

 - Step 2: You’ll connect with us — we’ll explore your experience, craft, and fit

 - Step 3: When a client brief fits your craft and expertise, we’ll get in touch and introduce you to the client and you can explore the opportunity with them directly

 - Step 4: If it's a fit, we'll onboard you and continue to support throughout

You won’t hear from us every week. But when you do, it’ll be for something relevant and real.


WE’RE BUILDING A DIVERSE NETWORK

We actively welcome applications from people of all backgrounds, lived experiences, and perspectives. No matter your gender, race, age, neurodiversity, or path into this industry, you’re welcome here.

If you’ve got the skills and mindset, we want to hear from you.


READY TO JOIN?

source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE GENERALIST COMPANY

We're making it radically easier for founders to find the talent they actually need, and for operators to do their most impactful and meaningful work.

We exist because founders waste time, effort and money on mis-scoped roles, mismatched skill sets, and slow recruiting - while brilliant generalists and operators struggle to find work that values their range and impact.

We fix that. We connect high-context talent with high-growth opportunities: freelance, fractional, contract, or full-time. Whether it’s a launch, a turnaround, or a first hire, we bring in the right people at the right moment. It’s faster, sharper, and built on trust.




AT A GLANCE

 - Location: Remote (global opportunities)

 - Compensation: You set your rate - freelance/contract, fractional, or full-time

 - Contract Type: Flexible - project-based, deployments, part-time, full-time

 - Start Date: Ongoing - join the pool, we’ll match you when the fit is right


ABOUT OUR OPPORTUNITIES

We work with some of the most ambitious early-stage startups and growing scale-ups - and they’re looking for people like you.

This is for operators who want to be where it matters - not on the sidelines.

Operators who know how to bring new products to market, build commercial engines from scratch, and turn strategy into traction. Whether you’re stepping into a launch moment, growing a pipeline, or scaling demand - these are roles that matter.

You might come in as a consultant, embed for a few months, or step into something more permanent. The shape varies. The impact doesn’t.

This isn’t about finding a job. It’s about finding work that matches your craft, your curiosity, and your capacity to drive real results.


THE KINDS OF DISCIPLINES AND ROLES WE MATCH FOR

You don’t need to fit neatly into a box - but here's an idea of what we're talking about:

 - Product Marketing → Product Marketing Manager, PMM, Head of PMM

 - Sales → BDR/SDR, Account Execs, Enterprise AE, Sales Ops Lead

 - Growth Marketing → Growth Lead, Performance Marketer, Demand Gen Manager

 - Customer Success → CSM, Head of CS, Onboarding Manager

 - Partnerships & BD → BD Lead, Channel Partnerships, Strategic Alliances

You might go deep on one discipline or span multiple. That’s the beauty of this pool.


WHO YOU ARE

You’re not just doing the job - you own the outcome. You’ve likely thrived in startup or scale-up environments, and know how to balance strategic thinking with getting your hands dirty.

Some traits we often see in great-fit candidates:

 - You’re entrepreneurial - you spot opportunities and act on them

 - You’re outcome-obsessed - activity is nice, results are better

 - You’re data-led - but know when to move without perfect info

 - You’re scrappy - you make it happen, whatever the constraints

 - You’re collaborative - you work seamlessly with other operators and disciplines

 - You’re story-driven - you can take a complex product and make it land with customers

 - You’re curious - always levelling up on new tools and tactics


THIS MIGHT NOT BE FOR YOU IF…

 - You prefer corporate stability over scrappy growth environments

 - You avoid direct accountability for outcomes like revenue or adoption

 - You want to specialise in one channel instead of experimenting broadly

 - Ambiguity around metrics or goals frustrates you

 - Fast pivots or context switching throw you off balance

 - You’d rather wait for perfect data than test and learn

 - You resist feedback, iteration, or adjusting plays on the fly


WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT

Joining means you're on our radar for exciting roles that match your zone of expertise. Here’s how it works:

 - Step 1: You’ll apply

 - Step 2: You’ll connect with us — we’ll explore your experience, craft, and fit

source_jobs.title: Product, Engineering & Tech Talent Pool
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE GENERALIST COMPANY

We're making it radically easier for founders to find the talent they actually need, and for operators to do their most impactful and meaningful work.

We exist because founders waste time, effort and money on mis-scoped roles, mismatched skill sets, and slow recruiting - while brilliant generalists and operators struggle to find work that values their range and impact.

We fix that. We connect high-context talent with high-growth opportunities: freelance, fractional, contract, or full-time. Whether it’s a launch, a turnaround, or a first hire, we bring in the right people at the right moment. It’s faster, sharper, and built on trust.


AT A GLANCE

 - Location: Remote (global opportunities)

 - Compensation: You set your rate - freelance/contract, fractional, or full-time

 - Contract Type: Flexible - project-based, deployments, part-time, full-time

 - Start Date: Ongoing - join the pool, we’ll match you when the fit is right


ABOUT OUR OPPORTUNITIES

We work with early-stage startups and scaling tech companies that need technical minds that can think like product owners and build like engineers.

This is for builders who want to be where it matters - not on the sidelines.

Whether you’re turning zero-to-one ideas into shipping MVPs, levelling up product systems, or stabilising messy technical debt, the work is fast-moving and high-impact. You might embed for a product launch, act as an interim tech lead, or join a long-term rebuild.

These teams need people who can think in systems and build with speed - whether it’s product, design, engineering, or data.


THE KINDS OF DISCIPLINES AND ROLES WE MATCH FOR

You don’t need to fit neatly into a box - but here's an idea of what we're talking about:

 - Product Management → Product Manager, Group PM, CPO

 - UX/UI Design → UX Designer, UI Designer, Product Designer

 - Engineering → Frontend, Backend, Full-Stack Engineer, AI Engineer (Product-side or infra-focused)

 - Data Science / ML / AI → ML Engineer, Data Scientist, AI Engineer (Model development, LLMs, embeddings)

 - QA & DevOps → QA Lead, DevOps Engineer, Infrastructure Engineer

You might go deep on one discipline or span multiple. That’s the beauty of this pool.


WHO YOU ARE

You’ve built before - and you know how to work across teams, users, and use cases. You ship and shape outcomes.

Some traits we often see in great-fit operators:

 - You’re user-obsessed - you ask why, not just what

 - You’re systems-minded - you design for scale and change

 - You’re hands-on - you're not afraid to prototype, refactor, or jump into details

 - You’re product-aware - you think in roadmaps and experiences, not just features

 - You’re collaborative - you play well with design, product, ops, and leadership

 - You’re curious - always learning, iterating, and improving your craft


THIS MIGHT NOT BE FOR YOU IF…

 - You prefer highly structured corporate environments

 - You need a team around you to make decisions

 - You want to specialise in one narrow function only

 - You’re not comfortable with ambiguity or autonomy

 - You find it difficult to context switch and adapt to fast-paced changes

 - Volatility scares you more than opportunity excites you


WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT

Joining means you're on our radar for exciting roles that match your zone of expertise. Here’s how it works:

 - Step 2: You’ll connect with us — we’ll explore your experience, craft, and fit

 - Step 3: When a client brief fits your craft and expertise, we’ll get in touch and introduce you to the client and you can explore the opportunity with them directly

 - Step 4: If it's a fit, we'll onboard you and continue to support throughout

You won’t hear from us every week. But when you do, it’ll be for something relevant and real.

source_jobs.title: Senior Python Engineer: AI Agents & Forecasting
source_jobs.description:
WE'RE BUILDING AI THAT PREDICTS THE FUTURE. LITERALLY.



THE COMPANY

Numinous https://numinouslabs.io is building the world's most advanced super-forecasting AI agents. We're creating autonomous systems that ingest real-world data, reason through complex scenarios, and produce predictions for the highest-stakes decisions on the planet. Think hedge funds, traders, governments, and Fortune 500 companies.

Right now, we're selling predictive intelligence to hedge funds and operating in prediction markets. But that's the starting point, not the ceiling. We're a small team, early-stage, well-backed, and moving fast.

Our mission: To build forecasting AI that fundamentally changes how critical decisions get made.



OUR CULTURE

We operate like founders, not employees. Everyone here has skin in the game and the autonomy to make real decisions. We move fast, communicate directly, and don't hide behind process. If something needs doing, you do it. If something's broken, you say it.

We value missionaries over mercenaries. We want people who care about the mission, not just the paycheque. The kind of people who'll stay up late because the problem is interesting, not because someone told them to.



THE ROLE

You'll architect and build the core infrastructure of the Numinous platform. This is the backbone that allows autonomous AI agents to ingest data, reason, compete, and forecast. This isn't gluing APIs together. You'll be designing the systems that score, rank, and incentivise AI forecasting agents in live, competitive environments.

Day to day, you're deep in backend architecture, building production-grade agent orchestration, designing data pipelines, and solving problems at the intersection of software engineering and quantitative forecasting. You'll work directly with the founders. There are no layers between you and the decisions that shape the product.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

 - Unifying the different parts of the stack. The network, signal layers, and forecasting architectures need to work together as one coherent system.

 - Designing and building the agent orchestration pipeline that allows AI forecasters to ingest data, reason, and produce predictions.

 - Building and optimising the signal pipeline that feeds real-world data into forecasting models.

 - Experimenting with different forecasting architectures to find optimal approaches for linking targets to signals.

 - Writing production-grade Python that handles complexity at scale, not scripts that work in a notebook.

 - Contributing to technical strategy alongside the founders. You'll have a voice in what gets built and why.

 - Evaluating and vetting technical candidates as the engineering team grows.



BAD NEWS

 - We're early. The engineering function is still being built.

 - Documentation is thin and processes are light

 - Priorities will shift and things will break

 - If you need a mature engineering culture with established practices, this isn't the role yet. You'll be helping build that culture, not inheriting it.



GOOD NEWS

 - More ownership, influence, and impact in 6 months than you'd get in 5 years at a bigger company

 - Technical co-founders who are direct, move fast, and actually understand what you're building

 - No politics, no layers, no waiting for approval

 - The problem is genuinely unsolved and the market is enormous

 - If we get this right, you'll have built the infrastructure behind the world's most advanced forecasting AI.



YOUR MISSION

Make the Numinous platform into a self-improving world model with the most accurate forecasts in the world. You exist to turn our vision of self-improving superhuman AI forecasting into a reality, building the systems that allow agents to get smarter, faster, and more accurate over time.



WHY JOIN NOW

This is founding-engineer territory. The team is small, the problem is unsolved, and the market is massive. You're not joining a machine that's already running. You're building it. The architectu

source_jobs.title: Community Lead - Operator Network
source_jobs.description:
Even the best startup ideas fail when they can't find the right people fast enough. We exist to ensure that never happens.




ABOUT US

The Generalist Company is an early stage talent company that matches fast-growth startups with high agency generalist operators who take ownership and thrive in early stage environments where outcomes matter more than titles. We're a small team based in London who's also responsible for building Plugged Founders, London's top founder community, and we're growing fast.

Our mission: To ensure that every ambitious, mission driven startup in the world has the talent at their fingertips to execute their vision.




WHAT WE DO

We're not a recruitment agency, we're a talent company. We don't just find great people, we build the functions that surface the talent startups need so that they have the capacity to execute at their fingertips, and founders can focus on building their business.

We connect founders with generalist operators across six categories: GTM & Growth, Operations, Tech & Product, People & Culture, Creative, Community & Events, and our bonus category, Ex Founders. We place full time roles, contract roles, and projects, catering to everyone from those who need flexible, fractional engagements, to those looking for their next full-time gig in an exciting startup.

Our clients are founders and leadership teams who are growing fast, building intensely, and are on a mission. They're not building mediocre lifestyle businesses, they're building absolute monsters that will shake the world. They want people who can think, build, act fast, and connect the dots. People who have been founders, should be founders, or probably will be founders someday.

We're building the infrastructure to serve operators and the founders they should be working with.




OUR CULTURE

 - We move fast and build things that last. Startups can't wait, but cutting corners creates the debt we're here to fix.

 - We trace problems to the root, not the symptom. We bring calm to chaos. We treat every company like it's ours and every person's goals like our own. Who you are matters more than what you've done here. Be a good person, do good things.

 - We're direct and we value clarity, but we also value good communication. You can be honest without being harsh, and you can push back without being difficult. We hold ourselves to a high standard, and we expect the same from the people we work with.

 - We'd rather say no than send the wrong person. A smaller network of exceptional people over a marketplace of unknowns. That philosophy runs through everything we do, including who we hire.




WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Someone who makes people feel like they belong the moment they walk into a room, and has the operational instinct to build the room in the first place. You'll be building our community of talented operators from the ground up. We're looking for someone to own this entirely.




BAD NEWS

 - The community doesn't exist yet. You're building it from scratch

 - The playbook isn't written. We know what we want it to do, not exactly how it should work

 - You'll need to be comfortable with ambiguity, shifting priorities, and figuring things out as you go

 - The team is small. There's no community team to lean on. You are the community team

 - If you need detailed briefs and weekly hand-holding, this isn't the role. You'll be setting the pace, not following it




GOOD NEWS

 - You're building something that directly drives revenue, not a side project nobody tracks

 - Real autonomy. Strategic direction from the founders, execution decisions are yours

 - Direct line to the people making decisions. No layers, no gatekeepers

 - The demand side is already working. Founders are coming to us with briefs. Your job is to build the supply engine that matches them

 - This role is designed to grow. It starts as a deployment, but there's a clear path to full-time and permanent, with the chance to become a founding team member

source_jobs.title: Community & Operations Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

Life as a founder is lonely. And the places founders go for connection are mostly stiff and formal.

PLUGGED is London's community for ambitious founders. Serious ambition, serious fun. Since launching in early 2024, we've been connecting founders through events and shared experiences. We're a tightly curated, fast-growing community of builders who are done with networking for networking's sake and want something real.

We run events, sprints, residentials, and programmes that solve the actual problems founders face. We're small, we move fast, and everything we build reflects the community we're building it for.

Our mission is to make it easier for great founders to change the world.




OUR CULTURE

We blend serious ambition with serious fun. No bullshit, no ego. Just people who understand the journey and want to help.

We do the unscalable. The personal touch, the follow-up nobody asked for, the detail that makes someone feel genuinely seen. That's what makes a community feel like a community.

We're honest, direct, and high-trust. We move fast but we care about quality: in our events, our membership, and how we show up for people.

We'd rather have a smaller room of the right people than a packed one of the wrong ones.




WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

You've been in and around startups. You have a founders associate kind of energy: close to building, fluent in the pace of startups, hungry to learn by doing. You're community-minded not because it's on your CV, but because it's who you are.




BAD NEWS

 - This role touches a lot: sales, ops, events, member experience. There'll be context switching

 - The team is small. You'll be running whole functions on your own

 - If you need a detailed brief to get started, this isn't the role

 - You'll be on the ground at events. Early mornings, late evenings, full presence. That's part of it
   
   


GOOD NEWS

 - You'll be working side by side with some of London's most ambitious founders from day one, hosting events for an ecosystem that has collectively raised $153m+

 - You'll work directly with the co-founders and the decisions you make will shape the business

 - Real ownership. You're not supporting someone else's vision, you're helping shape ours

 - The membership is already growing. You're coming in with momentum, not starting from zero

 - This role grows with you. There's no ceiling on where it goes
   
   


THE ROLE

You'll own the membership funnel at PLUGGED, from the moment someone applies to the moment they become one of our most engaged members.

This isn't an admin role with an exciting job title. It's a commercial, operational, and community-building role that directly determines the quality of our membership and the health of our growth.




YOUR MISSION

Keep the membership pipeline full and converting. Keep members happy and engaged. Run a sales process that's fast, high-quality, and human. Build an experience so good that members stay and refer their founder friends.




WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

Sales

 - Vet, score, and review membership applications. Accept, reject, and follow up with care

 - Run member interviews and make the call on who belongs

 - Own the pipeline: nurture sequences, follow-ups, and CRM hygiene

 - Run member trial days and manage the handoff into membership

 - Report on pipeline numbers and conversion rates
   
   

Membership Experience

 - Own onboarding. Make every new member feel like joining was the best decision they made this month

 - Run monthly member feedback meetings and act on feedback

 - Plan and run regular members-only events and sprints

 - Regular check-ins with members at key milestones: 1 month, 3 months, and beyond

 - Handle payments, upgrades, downgrades, cancellations, and invoices

 - Keep members informed with timely, well-crafted comms
   
   

Events

 - Show up hands-on at community events: Open Houses, Residentials, Retreats, Workshops
